attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.LANGUAGE_CODE, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.LANGUAGE_ID, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.NLS_LANGUAGE, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.NLS_TERRITORY, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.ISO_LANGUAGE, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.ISO_TERRITORY, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.NLS_CODESET, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.INSTALLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.LOCAL_DATE_LANGUAGE, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.UTF8_DATE_LANGUAGE, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.ISO_LANGUAGE_3, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES,
 (
 select LANGUAGE_CODE,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES
 minus
 select LANGUAGE_CODE,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_LANGUAGES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.LANGUAGE_CODE = STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.LANGUAGE_CODE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_FND_LANGUAGES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_FND_LANGUAGES)
